'''haguru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:labber|labber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labber|labber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haguru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hægirith|hægirith]] || [[word:hægirij|hægirij]] || [[word:hægirish|hægirish]] || [[word:hægiri|hægiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haguguruth|haguguruth]] || [[word:haguguruj|haguguruj]] || [[word:hagugurush|hagugurush]] || [[word:haguguru|haguguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haguruth|haguruth]] || [[word:haguruj|haguruj]] || [[word:hagurush|hagurush]] || [[word:haguru|haguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagufruth|hagufruth]] || [[word:hagufruj|hagufruj]] || [[word:hagufrush|hagufrush]] || [[word:hagufruf|hagufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haguruthu|haguruthu]] || [[word:haguruju|haguruju]] || [[word:hagurushu|hagurushu]] || [[word:haguruku|haguruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haguruth|haguruth]] || [[word:haguruj|haguruj]] || [[word:hagurush|hagurush]] || [[word:haguru|haguru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haguruthul|haguruthul]] || [[word:hagurujul|hagurujul]] || [[word:hagurushul|hagurushul]] || [[word:hagurukul|hagurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haguruthuthu|haguruthuthu]] || [[word:hagurujuju|hagurujuju]] || [[word:hagurushushu|hagurushushu]] || [[word:haguruku|haguruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haguruthun|haguruthun]] || [[word:hagurujun|hagurujun]] || [[word:hagurushun|hagurushun]] || [[word:hagurukun|hagurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haguruthuoro|haguruthuoro]] || [[word:hagurujuoro|hagurujuoro]] || [[word:hagurushuoro|hagurushuoro]] || [[word:hagurukuoro|hagurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
